prompt.description: The user's prompt for the run.

resourceId.description: Immutable daemon resource id returned by upload finalize.

items.description: Reference to an immutable daemon-owned uploaded resource.

attachments.description: Immutable daemon resource ids returned by upload finalize; paths and inline bytes are not accepted.

mode.description: Canonical run mode: ask, plan, and audit are read-only; agent writes; orchestrate is the autonomous coordinator intent. Engine strategies (race, attempts, swarm, create) are flags on a mode, not modes.

root.description: Absolute path of the project root.

context.description: Project context depth; auto is the only mode.

scope.description: What the run operates on: a project (with root) or nothing.

isolation.description: Run isolation: envelope (isolated worktree in the external per-project runtime namespace, the default) or live (the project tree itself).

execution.description: Execution isolation settings for a run.

items.description: User-supplied string that must contain visible content, not just whitespace.

harnesses.description: Eligible harness pool for the run; omitted = engine auto-pools.

primaryHarness.description: Primary harness the run should prefer.

portfolio.description: Budget portfolio weighting the harness router's quality/cost/latency and subscription-vs-API preferences (e.g. cheapest minimizes spend, burn maximizes quality, conserve-* deprioritizes one vendor).

model.description: Scalar model convenience: expands to the resolved primary harness only (never the pool); rejected with a multi-harness pool and no primary — use models instead.

models.description: Harness-scoped model map (harness id to model id); an entry here wins over the scalar model and over the per-harness settings default.

reviewerModels.description: Per-provider-family reviewer model overrides (legacy; reviewerPanel wins when present).

reviewerEfforts.description: Per-provider-family reviewer effort overrides (legacy; reviewerPanel wins when present).

n.description: Race width: number of best-of-N candidates.

attempts.description: Cap on convergence attempts; null = engine default.

untilClean.description: Agent flag: iterate until the convergence predicate is clean (no fixed cap).

swarm.description: Audit flag: bounded read-only research swarm.

synthesis.description: Best-of-N synthesis policy: auto only synthesizes an extra candidate when n>=3 and candidates genuinely complement; always/never force it.

maxUsd.description: USD cap for the run; null = no cap.

access.description: Requested access profile; effective access is derived by the engine and never client-supplied.

web.description: Web policy for the run (alias of externalContextPolicy; must match when both set).

externalContextPolicy.description: External web/context policy for the run.

browser.description: Request the agent-driven browser; preflight records per-lane effectiveness and refuses when no selected lane can receive it.

program.description: Executable invoked directly without an implicit shell.

args.description: Exact argv passed to the executable.

cwd.description: Optional project-relative working directory for the command.

envAllowlist.description: Non-secret parent environment names explicitly forwarded to the command.

items.description: Canonical deterministic command invocation; no implicit shell parsing.

tests.description: Typed-argv commands to run as deterministic gates.

path.description: Glob approved by the operator/user for this run; consumed only by the auto-protected gate/test path policy, not by built-in critical-path gates.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason for the approval.

items.description: Per-run typed operator approval allowing changes under an auto-protected gate/test path.

protectedPathApprovals.description: Typed per-run approvals for changing auto-protected gate/test paths; does not bypass built-in critical/security path human gates.

specPath.description: Path to a frozen SpecPack the run is held to.

specId.description: Id of the SpecPack the run is held to.

specHash.description: Content hash of the SpecPack the run is held to.

threadId.description: Thread this run is a turn of.

turnId.description: Internal daemon handoff only; rejected (400) when supplied by a client on POST /runs — use POST /threads/:id/turns instead.

parentRunId.description: Run this turn follows up on.

retryOf.description: Server-owned Exact Retry lineage; direct POST /runs rejects it.

planRunId.description: Internal daemon handoff only; rejected (400) on POST /runs. When set, the turn implements an approved plan from that run.

harness.description: Explicit reviewer harness id; repeated harness ids are allowed so one provider can review through multiple requested models.

model.description: Per-reviewer model hint, passed to that harness only.

effort.description: Per-reviewer effort hint, passed to that harness only.

items.description: One reviewer of an explicit reviewer panel.

reviewerPanel.description: Explicit reviewer panel; overrides the legacy reviewerModels/reviewerEfforts maps and preserves duplicate harness entries for multi-model same-provider reviews.

autonomy.description: Autonomy level for the orchestrate planner; only meaningful for mode=orchestrate.

maxToolCalls.description: Cap on orchestrate plan tool calls; only meaningful for mode=orchestrate.

request.description: Request body for POST /runs: prompt, mode, scope, routing, strategy flags, budget, policies, and spec/thread linkage.

ControlRunAgainDraft.description: Editable Run Again draft copied from a prior run with explicit omissions.
